name: Greedy Whalebuffet+ v2 (edited by Sai)
author: kianu
bootlegger: Pregame, all players choose least two normal characters from each category (Townsfolk, Outsider, Minion, Demon). The Storyteller selects from these characters* to form a valid setup.
Normal characters do not change alignments, add Evil, or warp the game. The game-warping characters are: Atheist, Alchemist, Philosopher, Heretic, Summoner, and Lil Monsta.
The Storyteller might declare other characters abnormal before setup, or outright "Fussy" ban characters from entering play.
*If a player chooses Choirboy, Alchemist, Amnesiac, Village Idiot, Kazali or Legion, other players may not get the character they asked for.
The Drunk, Lunatic and Marionette cannot be chosen, but can be given. The Hermit can be given (with the Lunatic or Drunk ability), even if not chosen.
Any character with Ω in the name is adjusted.
Greedy uses some special jinxes. They can be found in the Almanac link to the Discord at the top of the character sheet.

name: Choose your characters
ability: Choose the characters you want to play as. You must choose at least 2 normal Townsfolk, Outsiders, Minions & Demons each. You will learn your real role before the game starts.
flavor: Trust, I am that bitch. -Kianu
firstNightReminder: Choose at least 2 normal characters of each type.

special.name: card
special.value: At least 2 normal of each type, most wanted first

name: Alchemist
ability: You have a Minion ability. When using this, the Storyteller may prompt you to choose differently.
flavor: I wanna be different so badly, but I ALWAYSSSS choose Alchemist -Literally Everyone
firstNightReminder: Show the YOU ARE token & the Minion they have the ability of.

name: Cannibal
ability: You have the ability of the recently killed executee. If they are evil, you are poisoned until a good player dies by execution.
flavor: If you are what you eat, then I am an innocent being!

name: Courtier Ω
ability: Twice per game, at night, choose a character (different than last time): they are drunk for 3 nights & 3 days.
flavor: Remember kids, alcohol is poison, and royalty doesn't have to follow the rules! -Aloe
firstNightReminder: The Courtier might choose a character. Place the relevant reminder token besides the Courtier for how many uses they have left.
otherNightReminder: The Courtier might choose a character. Place the relevant reminder token besides the Courtier for how many uses they have left.

name: Cult Leader Ω
ability: Each night, you become the alignment of an alive neighbour. If all good players choose to join your cult, your team wins. If you die at night, become good.
flavor: I'd like to start the cult of chaos. -Evan (Evil Twin)
firstNightReminder: If the cult leader changed alignment, show them the thumbs up good signal of the thumbs down evil signal accordingly.
otherNightReminder: If the cult leader changed alignment, show them the thumbs up good signal of the thumbs down evil signal accordingly. If the Cult Leader dies at any time tonight, turn them good.

name: Engineer Ω
ability: Once per game, during the day, visit the Storyteller to learn a number of in play Minion or Demon characters equal to the Day.
flavor: day 3: goblin, goblin, scarlet woman - Benny's the Kazali -the engineer

name: Flowergirl
ability: Each night*, you learn if a Demon voted today.
flavor: Er is geen probleem, er is geen aanpak nodig, het beste ding is om niets te doen, het is irrelevant en iedereen moet het vergeten. -Victor_ian
otherNightReminder: Tell the Flowergirl Yes or No if a Demon vote today.

name: Huntsman Ω
ability: You start knowing an in play Outsider. They can't change character from other abilities. Once per game, at night, choose a player: if you choose that Outsider they become a not in play good Townsfolk. [+0 or +1 Outsider.]
flavor: You don't get to be the Heretic -TrappedCosmos
firstNightReminder: Wake the Huntsman & show the Outsider they added to the bag. They might choose a player. If they choose the Outsider they learned, the Outsider becomes a not in play townsfolk.
otherNightReminder: They might choose a player. If they choose the Outsider they learned, the Outsider becomesa not in play townsfolk.

name: Magician
ability: The Demon thinks you are a Minion. Minions think you are a Demon.
flavor: No I don't think I will. -Mole
firstNightReminder: During Minion Info, point to the Magician and the Demon. During Demon Info, point to the Magician and the Minions.

name: Mathematician
ability: Each night, you learn how many players' abilities worked abnormally (since dawn) due to another character's ability.
flavor: Math is like clocktower. You don't know what you're trying to do, nor do you know how to accomplish it. And yet, you succeed -iexistlol
firstNightReminder: Give a finger signal.
otherNightReminder: Give a finger signal.

name: Mayor Ω
ability: If only 3 players live (travellers don't count) & no execution occurs, your team wins. If you die at night, another player might die instead.
flavor: Entrust in my rightfully elected position against the dark ages that fall before us. You do not recall your vote? Don't worry about it; for I am the legitimate, healthy, and fairly elected Mayor of this town. Putting trust in politics has never failed you before.

name: Philosopher Ω
ability: Once per game, at night, choose a good character: gain that ability. If you pick a character that's not helpful to your team or ruins the games balance 3 times, you become Drunk.
flavor: If one thing in life is real, it's beer. In pursuit of others achievements, we lose sight of our own desires. -Kianu
firstNightReminder: The Philosopher either shows a 'no' head signal, or points to a good character. Tell them to Reconsider if the ability isn't helpful to their team or ruins the games balance. After 3 attempts & 3 reconsiders, Drunk them.
otherNightReminder: The Philosopher either shows a 'no' head signal, or points to a good character. Tell them to Reconsider if the ability isn't helpful to their team or ruins the games balance. After 3 attempts & 3 reconsiders, Drunk them.

name: Poppy Grower Ω
ability: Minions & Demons do not know each other. If you die (even if poisoned or drunk), they learn who each other are at night.
flavor: We’re doing poppy’s on the dance floor! I feel the rush & I’m pissing all over this stage tonight! -Satyr
firstNightReminder: Do not do the Minion Info & Demon Info steps. Wake the Demon, show the THESE CHARACTERS ARE NOT IN PLAY info token & any three good character tokens that are not in play.
otherNightReminder: If the Poppy Grower died today or tonight, wake the Minions, show the THIS IS THE DEMON info token & point to the Demon. Put them to sleep. Wake the Demon, show the THESE ARE YOUR MINIONS info token & point to the Minions. Put the Demon to sleep.

name: Preacher
ability: Each night, choose a player: a Minion, if chosen, learns this. All chosen Minions have no ability.
flavor: People are getting too loud. -Al-Hadashi
firstNightReminder: The Preacher chooses a player. If they chose a Minion: Put the Preacher to sleep. Wake the Minion. Show THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU token & the Preacher token. Don't wake the chosen Minions unless the Preacher is dead, poisoned or drunk.
otherNightReminder: The Preacher chooses a player. If they chose a Minion: Put the Preacher to sleep. Wake the Minion. Show THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU token & the Preacher token. Don't wake the chosen Minions unless the Preacher is dead, poisoned or drunk.

name: Princess
ability: On your 1st day, if you nominated & executed a player, the Demon doesn't kill tonight.
flavor: Embarassssinngggggg -Spectrum
otherNightReminder: If the Princess nominated the player who was executed today, the Demon wakes as normal, but no one dies to the Demon's ability.

name: Soldier Ω
ability: You are safe from the Demon. Each night*, if your ability protected you from the Demon, wake up & learn so.
flavor: As The Spy said to the Heretic, as Mole said to Al-Hadashi, as people believing I’m not the Wraith… No. -Iceni
otherNightReminder: If the Soldier is protected, wake them up & tell them so. Otherwise, don't.

name: Butler
ability: Each night, choose a player (not yourself): tomorrow, you may only vote if they are voting too.
flavor: Breathe, Identify the problem, Tea break, Consider your options, Handle it. B.I.T.C.H -Alfred Pennyworth
firstNightReminder: The Butler chooses a player.
otherNightReminder: The Butler chooses a player.

name: Drunk
ability: You do not know you are the Drunk. You think you are a Townsfolk character, but you are not.
flavor: I may be drunk, but I didn't drink an ounce of beer! Somehow? -Spectrum

name: Hatter Ω
ability: If you die, at night, choose Minions or Demons. All players of the type you chose picks new characters of the same type to be.
flavor: 10/6 is a much greater number than 6 - 7  -Soril
otherNightReminder: If the Hatter died today or tonight, wake the Hatter & make them choose either Minions or Demons. Wake all players of the type they chose & allow them to choose a new character of the same type to become (can be the character they currently are).

name: Heretic Ω
ability: Whoever wins, loses, & whoever loses, wins, even if you are dead. If only evil players are alive, evil wins.
flavor: I swear if it's a Heretic game. -Mole

name: Hermit Ω
ability: You have 3 Outsider abilities. You know each, even if drunk or poisoned. [-0 or -1 Outsiders]
flavor: Goon Goon Goon! - Satyr
firstNightReminder: Tell the Hermit the 3 abilities they have, no matter if they are Drunk/Poisoned or not. Run any Outsider abilities they have.
otherNightReminder: Run any Outsider abilities they have.

name: Lunatic Ω
ability: You think you are a Demon, but you are not. The Demon knows you are the Lunatic & who you choose at night.
flavor: If I'm the Lunatic I'm gonna be very angry -Sam
firstNightReminder: If there are 7 or more players, wake the Lunatic: Show the THESE ARE YOUR MINIONS token. Point to any players. Show the THESE CHARACTERS ARE NOT IN PLAY token. Show 3 good character tokens. Put the Lunatic to sleep. Wake the Demon. Show the YOU ARE info token & the Demon token. Show the THIS PLAYER IS info token & the Lunatic token, then point to the Lunatic.
otherNightReminder: Do whatever needs to be done to simulate the Demon acting. Put the Lunatic to sleep. Wake the Demon. Show the Lunatic token & point to them, then their target(s).

name: Plague Doctor
ability: When you die, the Storyteller gains a Minion ability.
flavor: You're all my marionettes now.
otherNightReminder: If the Plague Doctor died, the Storyteller gained a Minion ability. If you haven't done this yet, do so now.

name: Recluse Ω
ability: You might register as any character, alignment, or living status, even if dead.
flavor: I love men -You know who.

name: Snitch Ω
ability: Each Minion starts knowing a different in-play good character.
flavor: It was Al-Hadashi -Taken Kianu
firstNightReminder: Show each Minion a different in-play good character.

name: Sweetheart Ω
ability: When you die, 1 player is drunk from now on. If you die, you may guess (once) which player you Drunked during the day. If correct, all players learn you are the Sweetheart tonight.
flavor: My heart will go on! *Penny whistle solo*. -Miss Chief
otherNightReminder: If the Sweetheart died, a player became drunk immediately. If you haven't done this yet, do so now.

name: Boffin
ability: The Demon (even if drunk or poisoned) has a not-in-play good character's ability. You both know which.
flavor: Sometimes the questions are complicated and the answers are simple. -Dr. Seuss
firstNightReminder: Wake the Boffin and the Demon. Show them the not in-play Townsfolk ability the Demon has.

name: Cerenovus
ability: Each night, choose a player & a good character: they are "mad" they are this character tomorrow, or might be executed.
flavor: what are you on about, im definitely the politician, yep, nothing to see here - SereNOvus Shrek
firstNightReminder: They choose a player and good character for them to be mad as. Tell the chosen player.
otherNightReminder: They choose a player and good character for them to be mad as. Tell the chosen player.

name: Evil Twin
ability: You & an opposing player know each other. If the good player is executed, evil wins. Good can't win if you both live.
flavor: Yeah that’s my Twinnem, Go best friend! -Mattoo
firstNightReminder: Wake both twins. Allow them to speak to each other. Show the good twin's character token to the Evil Twin & vice versa. If any twin changes character while this ability is still in affect, tell the other twin.

name: Marionette
ability: You think you are a good character, but you are not. The Demon knows who you are. [You neighbor the Demon]
flavor: I would like to Wizard wish that everyone must tell one of their neighbors they're their Marionette. -Drazhar
firstNightReminder: Wake the Demon. Point to the player marked IS THE MARIONETTE & show the THIS PLAYER IS token & the Marionette character token.

name: Pit-Hag Ω
ability: Each other night*, you may choose a player & character they become (if not in play). If a potential evil-making character or a Demon is made, deaths tonight are arbitrary.
flavor: Its definetly not a Vortox game... yet -Fleuris
otherNightReminder: The Pit-Hag points to a player & a character on the sheet. If this character is not in play, wake that player & show them the 'You are' card & the relevant character token. If the character is in play, nothing happens.

name: Psychopath Ω
ability: If there are 5 or more alive players (not including travellers), each day, before nominations, you may publicly choose a player: they die. If executed, you only die if you lose roshambo.
flavor: My weapon of choice? Old man farts. -Jyraphe

name: Scarlet Woman
ability: If there are 5 or more players alive & the Demon dies, you become the Demon. (Travellers don't count.)
flavor: The first person to say "Smooch" at me will get to pick the quote! You can only choose 1 quote.
otherNightReminder: If the Scarlet Woman becomes the Demon, tell them.

name: Spy
ability: Each night, you see the Grimoire. You might register as good & as a Townsfolk or Outsider, even if dead.
flavor: The world's greatest actor doesn't need a stage... -Soril
firstNightReminder: Show them the Grimoire.
otherNightReminder: Show them the Grimoire.

name: Summoner Ω
ability: On the 3rd night, choose a player: they become an evil Demon of your choice. [No Demon]
flavor: With this treasure, I summon… -Chara
otherNightReminder: Change the Summoner reminder token to the relevant night. If it is night 3, the Summoner chooses a player & a Demon. Put the Summoner to sleep. Wake the chosen player. Show the YOU ARE token, a thumbs down & the chosen Demon token. If it's night 2, ask the Summoner if they want to create a Pukka

name: Vizier
ability: All players know you are the Vizier. You cannot die during the day. If good voted, you may choose to execute immediately.
flavor: No thank youuu -Reece
firstNightReminder: Announce to all players the Vizier is the Vizier. DON'T ANNOUNCE if an Alsaahir or Investigator is in-play.

name: Widow
ability: On your 1st night, look at the Grimoire & choose a player: they are poisoned. 1 good player knows a Widow is in play.
flavor: The first person to say "Widowmaker" at me will get to pick the quote! You can only choose 1 quote.
firstNightReminder: Show the grim. They choose 1 player to poison.

name: Wizard Ω
ability: Once per game, choose to make a wish. If granted, it might have a price & leave a clue as to its nature. If you propose a declined wish for your team 3 times, you turn into a character of the same type.
flavor: Madam Morrible-- MM, flip it around? Wicked Witch!! -Orpheus
firstNightReminder: Run the Wizard's ability, if applicable. If they make a stupid wish, put the "Bruh" reminder token next to them. At 3 Bruh's, turn them into a character of the same type.
otherNightReminder: Run the Wizard's ability, if applicable. If they make a stupid wish, put the "Bruh" reminder token next to them. At 3 Bruh's, turn them into a character of the same type.

name: Wraith
ability: You may choose to open your eyes at night. You wake when other evil players do.
flavor: I am Iceni.
firstNightReminder: Wake the Wraith whenever other evil players do.
otherNightReminder: Wake the Wraith whenever other evil players do.

name: Al-Hadikhia
ability: Each night*, you may choose 3 players (all players learn who): each silently chooses to live or die, but if all live, all die.
flavor: This is for all my demons who don’t get hyped enough
otherNightReminder: The Al-Hadikhia chooses three players. Wake the player marked 1 and ask them to live or die. Do the same for the players marked 2 and 3. If all three players are alive, kills all three in the order they were chosen.

name: Kazali Ω
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. [You choose which players are which Minions, your Minion choices may be denied. -? to +? Outsiders]
flavor: Let's lock in besties. -Nic
firstNightReminder: Wake the Kazali, allow them to choose Minions. Deny their Minion choices until the game is balanced.
otherNightReminder: The Kazali chooses a player.

name: Legion
ability: Each night*, a player might die. Executions fail if only evil voted. You register as a Minion too. [Most players are Legion]
flavor: It's an Atheist game. Also, Orpheus is my evil twin. -Spectrum
otherNightReminder: A player might die. 1 death per Legion alive/with ability.

name: Leviathan
ability: If more than 1 good player is executed, evil wins. All players know you are in play. After day 5, evil wins.
flavor: Don't worry it's just a Wizard wish. -The Politician
firstNightReminder: Declare that 'The Leviathan is in play.' Mark the Leviathan with the DAY 1 reminder.
otherNightReminder: Wake the Leviathan to choose a player if one of their jinxes permits. Switch the Leviathan token with the relevant day.

name: Lleech
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. You start by choosing a player: they are poisoned. You die if & only if they are dead.
flavor: 'For Science!' said definitely the Sailor -boypower
firstNightReminder: The Lleech chooses a player.
otherNightReminder: The Lleech chooses a player.

name: Riot
ability: On your third day, Minions become Riot & nominees die but nominate an alive player immediately. This must happen.
flavor: Guys I need to leave in 30 minutes
otherNightReminder: Wake the Riot to choose a player if the jinxes permit.

name: Vigormortis
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Minions you kill keep their ability & poison 1 Townsfolk neighbor. [-1 Outsider]
flavor: Your information? What information?
otherNightReminder: The Vigormortis chooses a player. If that player is a Minion & dies, choose 1 of their neighbours to be poisoned.

name: Vortox
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Townsfolk abilities yield false info. Each day, if no-one is executed, evil wins.
flavor: The first person to say "Dorothy" at me will get to pick the quote! You can only choose 1 quote.
otherNightReminder: The Vortox chooses a player.

name: Yaggababble
ability: You start knowing a secret phrase. For each time you said it publicly today, a player might die.
flavor: Hallo, kan jij jouw bek houden -Victor_ian
firstNightReminder: Show the Yaggababble their secret phrase.
otherNightReminder: For each time the Yaggababble said the phrase today, you may choose a player. They die.

name: Choose a Traveller
ability: Choose a Traveller character to become.
firstNightReminder: The Traveller player chooses a character.

name: Dealer's Choice Ω
ability: A player can send Dealers Choice during setup to allow any character. You can still say what style of character you'd prefer, or anything you don't want.
flavor: I got $5 saying Iceni is the Wraith. $20 saying he's the King.
firstNightReminder: OPTIONALLY: Ask all evil players what they will be bluffing. This is simply an open chance to get their claims for Dreamer or things of the such. You may not do this anytime else.
